arts.ttl: Jordan Henderson breaks Ajax PROMISE to force shock Champions League move
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano reported on Thursday that the 34-year-old was heading to Monaco, where he would sign an 18-month contract with the side that will face Benfica in the knockout phase of the Champions League. Jordan Henderson is set to leave Ajax fuming, with the England international midfielder now setting his sights on a transfer to Monaco .

arts.ttl: Done Deal: Milan Secures Gimenez, a New Striker Arrives
arts.sum: AC Milan have successfully acquired Santiago Gimenez from Feyenoord. The talented striker is set to arrive in Italy today to undergo medical examinations before signing a contract that will keep him at the club until June 2029. The deal will see Gimenez earn 2.5 million euros net per year. The post Done Deal: Milan Secures Gimenez, a New Striker Arrives appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Milan Closing in on Santiago Gimenez Signing
arts.sum: AC Milan are on the verge of securing a major transfer coup as they edge closer to signing Feyenoord's prolific striker Santiago Gimenez. The Rossoneri have made significant progress in negotiations over the past few hours, with growing optimism that the deal could be finalized imminently.
